positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic woodland fox curled up in a crescent moon shape, surrounded by glowing botanical elements like bioluminescent ferns and delicate wildflowers. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, utilizing negative space effectively for a clean silhouette look. Use a deep indigo, forest emerald, and muted gold color palette against a creamy off-white background. Style should be inspired by Art Nouveau botanical engravings mixed with modern geometric line art. High contrast, crisp linework, perfect symmetry, vector-graphic quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: artifacts, low resolution, noisy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, gradient, photo, realistic, oil painting, jpeg artifacts
